"""
Download a DailyMotion video from the given URL.

Arguments:
 * url (str): The DailyMotion URL to download.
 * output_dir (str): Directory to save the downloaded file. If not set (``'.'``, default), the current directory is used.
 * merge (bool): Whether to merge downloaded parts into a single file. If not set (``True``, default), multiple parts are merged.
 * info_only (bool): If True, only print information about the video without downloading. If not set (``False``, default), the video will be downloaded.
 * kwargs (dict): Additional keyword arguments accepted by the downloader (not used directly by this function).
"""
